creator: ler@ler-freebie.iadfw.net
text:
StarOffice 5.2 which was running fine on a 4Jun2001 RELENG_4 build, now puts up it's
splash screen and gets stuck in a linux_new_select sched_yield loop, and never initializes.

How-To-Repeat: update to 13Jun2001 Kernel sources, compile kernel, try and run staroffice 5.2
